name: Quick Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons fresh basil leaves, minced (or 2 teaspoons dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and seed the tomatoes.
2. Tear the bread into small pieces.
3. Peel the garlic and put it into the work bowl of a food processor along with the tomatoes and bread.
4. Pulse three times until blended.
5. With the motor running, pour the vinegar and oil through the feed tube and process until smoothly pureed.
6. Mix the tomato puree, tomato juice, beef broth, and basil together in a large bowl and refrigerate until chilled.
7. Stem, quarter, and seed the bell pepper.
8. Peel and quarter the onion.
9. Peel and halve the cucumber lengthwise, remove the seeds with a spoon, and cut pieces into halves.
10. Place all the vegetables in the food processor and pulse until coarsely chopped.
11. Stir the vegetables, Worcestershire sauce, hot red pepper sauce, salt, and black pepper into the soup.
12. Serve chilled.
